After an incredible 2025 Manchester's Springtime Feast is returning to Wythenshawe Park & Gardens for its BIGGEST celebration to date! After an incredible 2025 event, we’re heading to the back to the stunning fields of Wythenshawe Park & Gardens for a weekend jam-packed with brand-new production, eccentric live entertainment, and an abundance of culinary delights 🌳 Alongside the cornerstone classics, you can expect Mark the date, grab your family and friends, and lock yourselves in for Manchester's ultimate foodie celebration this Spring. Last year tickets were snapped up faster than Yorkshire puds at a Sunday Roast... don't hang about - get yours before they're all gone! Join thousands of Stroll through the peaceful green fields of Wythenshawe Park and follow the tempting scents of world flavours as they lead you on a global adventure courtesy of some of the UK’s best street food traders. Indulge in cuisines from Greece, Italy, Spain, Jamaica, Malaysia, Venezuela, Craving something savoury? How about tender slow-cooked beef in a rich onion gravy, fluffy steamed bao buns filled with melt-in-the-mouth braised pork belly or crispy pan-fried tofu, or authentic Birria tacos packed with the bold, vibrant spices of western Mexico? After an incredible 2025 event, we’re heading to the back to the stunning fields of Wythenshawe Park & Gardens for a weekend jam-packed with brand-new production, eccentric live entertainment, and an abundance of culinary delights 🌳 . Alongside the cornerstone classics, you can expect... . Our Biggest Music Lineup Yet! (Including Brand-New Tributes). Manchester's Leading Chefs in the Cookery Theatre. Brand-New Attractions & Family Activities . Heightened Production & New Entertainment (yes, new weird & wonderful attractions you won't see anywhere else). Fresh Street Food & Bar Line-up. Mark the date, grab your family and friends, and lock yourselves in for Manchester's ultimate foodie celebration this Spring. Last year tickets were snapped up faster than Yorkshire puds at a Sunday Roast... don't hang about - get yours before they're all gone! Join thousands of Foodies in Wythenshawe Park this May! . As seen in The BBC, The Guardian & MEN . . . FURTHER INFO . What's included with your ticket? . NEW: Our Biggest Music Lineup Yet + Unseen Tribute Acts!. NEW: Activities & Attractions . NEW: Eccentric Production & Family Entertainment. FREE Live Chef Demos From Manchester's Leading Chefs (Minimum of 8 demos over the 2 days). FREE Live Music (Minimum of 12 acts over 2 days). FREE Live Entertainment/Performing Arts – 6 shows per day. FREE Roaming Comedy Acts. FREE Festival Programmes. FREE Kids Activities & Foodie Colouring Books. FREE Foodie Olympics - Sports Day-Inspired Family Mini-Games. FREE Foodie Clue Quest Scavenger Hunt . Explore the Artisan Markets. Delicious Street Food from Leading Vendors . Ample Furniture & Deckchairs to Kick Back and Relax. Independent Bars (Including an Ale House, Speciality Cider, Gin & Wine Bars). Fun Fair. Art Displays. Fast Track Entry. Over £164,300 raised for local mental health charities so far. "An amazing mix of new discoveries and the classics we love — the perfect foodie day out.” - 2025 Attendee. . FURTHER DETAILS . International Street Food. Stroll through the peaceful green fields of Wythenshawe Park and follow the tempting scents of world flavours as they lead you on a global adventure courtesy of some of the UK’s best street food traders. Indulge in cuisines from Greece, Italy, Spain, Jamaica, Malaysia, Venezuela, Gambia, Hungary, Mexico and beyond – there’s a world tour of flavour, right here in Manchester.. Craving something savoury? How about tender slow-cooked beef in a rich onion gravy, fluffy steamed bao buns filled with melt-in-the-mouth braised pork belly or crispy pan-fried tofu, or authentic Birria tacos packed with the bold, vibrant spices of western Mexico?. Got a sweet tooth? Treat yourself to traditional Japanese bubble waffles piled high with crushed biscuits and ice cream, Dutch-style mini pancakes drizzled with golden syrup and blueberry sauce, or indulgent hand-baked brownies coated in silky Belgian chocolate.. With over 30 cuisines to explore, it’s the perfect weekend to feast, discover and enjoy new flavours from every corner of the globe. . And for our vegan visitors – you’re in safe hands! Nearly all our food stalls offer tempting plant-based options, so everyone can tuck in and enjoy. . Live Cookery Theatre. ln partnership with The Great British Bake Off's Makbul Patel, we’re hosting a Live Cookery Theatre all weekend! Watch as the region’s finest chefs expertly whip up incredible dishes on stage, sharing all the tips and tricks needed culinary mastery — you’ll leave inspired (and hungry)! candidates.evidence_text: Don’t miss the Spinningfields Makers Market every third Saturday of the month for a celebration of local talent, creativity and mouthwatering treats The markets feature over 40 fantastic stalls . It’s a treasure trove of one-of-a-kind handcrafted wonders, delicious food and unique finds, with something for everyone The Spinningfields Makers Market is dog-friendly , so bring your pup along to enjoy the fun. With doggy treats and pet-focused stalls, it’s the perfect day out for you and your four-legged companion LOCATION Spinningfields Square, Quay St, Manchester M3 3AP, UK Take a leisurely wander through the market, chat with the producers and don’t miss out on the chance to indulge in everything from artisanal cheeses to decadent chocolates, delightful tarts and an array of scrumptious street food Levenshulme – 27th Jun. . . . 27 June 2026 . 10am-4pm . . View Venue Information . . . . . . . . . . . . Attending Makers. . . Solar Powered Lemonade. . The Best Lemonade In The World! . . More Info . . . . . Olive & Feta Pastry Co.. . More Info . . . . . House of Stardust. . Affordable Art for cool people! Manchester based graphic designer specialising in affordable, eclectic wall art for funky homes! . . More Info . . . . . Doodles of Beamish. . Bring Joy to Your Space with Doodles of Beamish. . More Info . . . . . Smashing Brownies. . We Bake everyday and use only the finest ingredients. Quality means everything to us.. . More Info . . . . . Ginger’s Comfort Emporium. . Small batch, inventively flavoured ice cream and sorbet. . . More Info . . . . . Rainy Studio. . More Info . . . . . World Famous Hot Sauce. . Batch made hot sauce. Vegan and gluten free. Made by had in Stockport. . . More Info . . . . . Meksikan. . Burritos, Tacos , Loaded Fries and sides. All made fresh to order - you won't struggle to find us on the market , just follow your nose !. . More Info . . . . . Marleys Tacos. . We have been trading with the makers markets for over 10 years selling a range of hot foods.. . More Info . . . . . Abbey Lou. . More Info . . . . . SorrelDesigns. . Add a splash of colour and creativity to your home with these ceramic vases, each piece inspired by organic forms and modern art. Featuring soft pastel tones, abstract curves, and playful patterns, these vases are perfect for fresh blooms or as standalone statement pieces.. . More Info . . . . . The Doughnuteers. . More Info . . . . . Lushbrownies. . Hello from Lushbrownies Loads of flavours made with real butter, free range eggs and Belgian chocolate Catch us at Knutsford, Chorlton, Sale and West Didsbury Makers Markets. . More Info . . . . . okaycokey. . 925 Sterling Silver | 100% handmade by me | Recycled Eco-Silver, Bio packaging | 💷 10% off first order. . More Info . . . . . Bella Ciao Empanadas. . Looking for a truly authentic food experience? Bella Ciao Empanadas brings the rich culinary tradition of Latin America right to you! We specialize in hand-made, traditional empanadas—the favourite street-food snack. Perfect for eating on the move, each empanada offers a delicious balance of crispy crust and flavourful filling. Find us today and discover why the empanada is celebrated worldwide!. . More Info . . . . . Ellis Grey Jewellery. . Long lasting, minimalist gold jewellery designed to be worn everyday.. . More Info . . . . . Oh Mei Dumpling. . Multi-award-winning dumplings that everyone raves about! Handmade, fresh, and bursting with flavour. Come see why we’ve won Best Street Food Trader of the Year three times! Stockport Best Street Food Trader 2018 Manchester Best Street Food Trader 2018 Manchester Best Street Food Trader 2020 . . More Info . . . . . Scent Oud. . Scent Oud is a modern minimalist fragrance brand based in Manchester, creating sophisticated, long-lasting scents that tell a story. Each perfume blends craftsmanship, authenticity, and emotion. Designed for those who see fragrance as a form of self-expression. Explore our bestselling collection, including Titan, Midnight Musk, and Bonnie & Clyde, alongside exclusive seasonal releases.. . More Info . . . . . Marking The Wild. . Art prints drawn from real hikes across the wilds of the UK. . . More Info . . . . . Pen Fight. . A queer feminist zine distro and tiny press - plus badges, stickers, patches, and art prints. . More Info . . . . . Chizabella Organics. . A qualified organic skincare formulator producing handmade organic Skin and hair care products. . . More Info . . . . . Teatime Collective. . Teatime Collective – Manchester’s Vegan Bakery Starting life as a small vegan café in Hulme back in 2013, Teatime Collective has been serving up plant-based comfort food for over a decade. What began as a cosy local spot has grown into a much-loved travelling bakery – popping up at markets and events around Manchester and beyond. We bake everything from custard slices, cinnamon buns, and croissants to big layer cakes, Bakewell tarts, and rocky roads – all 100% vegan and made from scratch. And it’s not just sweet stuff anymore – we’ve recently added a savoury range featuring our handmade pies and vegan sausage rolls, perfect for market munching or taking home for later. Keep an eye out for us at makers markets and events, or follow us online to see where we’ll be next.. . More Info . . . . . The Camels Hump Lebanese Street Food. . Authentic Lebanese Middle Eastern Deli providing Mezze, International Bakery , Arabian Salads, Dips, Homemade Pistachio Bakalawa - Sweet, Daily offers. Family Run with traditional recipes passed down from generations made with love ❤️ . . More Info . . . . . Stacy’s Unique Boutique. . Welcome to Stacy's Unique Boutique. Where color, creativity, and comfort come together! 🌈 Every piece is lovingly handmade by me, using bright, playful prints that let kids shine just as brightly as their personalities. No mass production here — just unique, joy-filled clothing made with care and a whole lot of heart. 💕 . . More Info . . . . . Dotty Red. . Luxury hair accessories and handmade Boho clothing.. . More Info . . . . . Fitzii Jewellery. . Handmade Jewellery, made using recycled and repurposed items.. . More Info . . . . . Neighbourhood Brew Co. . Hello! We are Neighbourhood Brew Co, a microbrewery based in Poynton Cheshire. We produce a mix of craft beers varying in style from Lager all the way to Fruited Sours and IPA.

What is Pedddle? . Blog . Contact Us . Join Pedddle . The Market Success Guide . Login . Search . Search for: . Northern Quarter Makers Market. Second Sunday of every month Manchester, M4 5JD. Taking place on the second Sunday of every month in the heart of Manchester, the Northern Quarter Makers Market is a great market for an independent, edgy city vibe, with 95 stallholders showcasing their wares. . . . Details. Favourite Address Oak Street Manchester M4 5JD . Date Second Sunday of every month Time 11:00am - 5:00pm Next Markets 10th May 2026 , 14th Jun 2026 , 12th Jul 2026 , 9th Aug 2026 , 13th Sep 2026 , 11th Oct 2026 , 8th Nov 2026 , 13th Dec 2026 Organiser The Makers Market Social Website themakersmarket.co.uk/pages/northern-quarter-makers-market Accessibility Generally a flat market, wheelchair and pushchair accessible, but being in central Manchester please expect kerbs and the usual pedestrian/traffic. Parking Nearby city centre car parks available. We recommend arriving on public transport; the nearest tram stop is Shudehill (4 min walk), by Bus please use Shudehill Interchange (4 min walk), or if arriving by train, this market is just a 14 minute walk from Piccadilly (Cycle racks available). Facilities Wheelchair Accessible All Outdoor Seating Available Dog Friendly Free Entry Markets in Manchester , North West , Greater Manchester . The Northern Quarter Makers Market makes Manchester come alive with passionate creatives that are eager to share and inspire visitors with their award-winning food and drink, exhibiting awesome art, modern craft and vintage and live music. Northern Quarter Makers Market showcases around 95 stallholders, and continues to promise the creme de la creme when it comes to artisan traders in Manchester and the North West. A great place to visit if you want to shop independent in the city. They say ‘a weekend well spent brings a week of content’… so we’ll see you the in NQ!. Share this:. candidates.evidence_text: Altrincham Market and market house, part restaurant, part market, part town square. Food, drink, shopping and more Altrincham ‪Market House. Eat, meet, drink, shop, watch, talk, listen, laugh. Come in, be yourself and if you like it bring your friends! Altrincham’s charter dates back to 1290, it’s location at the intersection of the Cheshire farm belt and the commercial commuter zone of Manchester means the town has a long and important history. Altrincham market is now at the heart of the regeneration of ‘the modern market tow The covered market hosts regional food producers, vintage fashion and furniture, home & garden and contemporary craft on a Tuesday, Friday, Saturday and Sunday Altrincham Market House Opening Hours Tues-Sat : 9am-10pm Sun : 9am-6pm Mon : Closed The Outdoor Market (Shopping) Tues: 8am-3pm Fri: 8am-3pm Sat: 8am-4pm Sun: 10am-4pm Altrincham Market House is home to award-winning independent quality food operators. These include the following: Honest Crust – wood fired pizza “among the country’s best”. Tender Cow who serve rare breed flat iron steak and chips. Jack in the Box selling fantastic craft beers. News and events . Your news . Bowlee is back - car boot sale and market returns for new season . . . Bowlee is back - car boot sale and market returns for new season . The new car boot season at Bowlee Community Park in Middleton begins on Sunday, 5 April 2026. Published: 3 March 2026 . . Bowlee Car Boot Sale and Market – one of the most popular in Greater Manchester, attracting thousands of visitors every week, returns for the new season on Sunday, 5 April 2026.. Organised by Rochdale Borough Council, the 2026 season at Bowlee Community Park in Middleton begins with an Easter bank holiday double on Sunday, 5 April 2026 and Monday, 6 April 2026 and then runs on Sundays and bank holiday Mondays right through until 11 October 2026 (excluding Sunday, 3 May 2026). . Sellers do not need to pre-book, and for the 8th year in a row prices have been frozen at £15 for cars, £20 for small vans/people carriers/4X4s and £25 for large vans and above. For buyers, there are parking spaces for more than 1,200 cars at £2.50 per vehicle.. Bowlee Car Boot Sale and Market is returning for its 16th year.. . ‘One of the busiest ever’. The event, now in its 16th year, takes a break on Sunday, 3 May 2026 to make way for Tour de Manc – the annual Greater Manchester charity bike ride that sets off from Bowlee Park with the choice of a 60-kilometre, 100-kilometre, 165-kilometre mile or 201-kilometre ride.. Up to 31 sales will take place this year and on 2 of the sales, parking for buyers will be reduced to £1. In response to customer feedback, if bad weather is forecast, a decision will be announced by 3pm the day before the sale, instead of the previous 6pm.. The event is one of the most popular in Greater Manchester, attracting thousands of visitors every week.. . Councillor Tricia Ayrton, cabinet member for climate change and environment, said:. “I am pleased this great event is returning to Bowlee Community Park for another year. We have an amazing following at Bowlee and last year was one of the busiest ever. Bargain hunters can dig out great deals and one-off items, and of course you can sell your own things too. People are a lot more conscious about recycling and re-selling now, so car boot sales are a great way of extending the life of items and reducing waste.”. View all the new dates and more details about the events . Bowlee Community Park is off Heywood Old Road (A6045), Middleton M24 4SB with easy access from the M60 (junction 19). Find Bowlee Community Park on Google Maps . Social media. Follow @BowleeCarBoot on Facebook . Search #BowleeCarBoot on Instagram . Related content. Councillor Tricia Ayrton .
